info.description: An optional section with a headline, an image on one side and a vertical list of points on the other — e.g. the groundwater page's "Borehole programs with defensible field data" block.

eyebrow.description: Small uppercase kicker above the headline, e.g. GROUNDWATER MONITORING.

heading.description: The section headline, e.g. "Borehole programs with defensible field data."

media.description: The image shown beside the list. If left empty, a plain gradient placeholder shows instead.

points.description: The list items, shown as rows with a coloured left edge. Add, remove or drag to reorder.
